title: ☕ 咖啡店点单 · 美国日常版

lines.en: Hi, what can I get started for you?
Can I get a medium iced latte with oat milk?
lines.cn: 我要一杯中杯冰拿铁，加燕麦奶。

lines.en: Can I also get a blueberry muffin, warmed up?
lines.cn: 再要一个蓝莓马芬，加热一下。

lines.en: You got it. That'll be $8.25. For here or to go?
lines.cn: 好的。一共8块2毛5。在这喝还是带走？

lines.en: To go, please. Can I tap?

example.en: Can I get a bottle of water?
Can I get a blueberry muffin?

vocab.word: What can I get started for you?
vocab.meaning: 想喝点什么？（咖啡店标准问候）

example.en: Hi, what can I get started for you?
Good morning! What can I get for you?
What can I get you today?
Can I get two pumps of caramel?
How many pumps of syrup in a grande?
I'd like the croissant warmed up.
Do you want it warmed up?

vocab.meaning: 在这喝还是带走？（高频问句）
能刷卡吗？（感应支付，美国超常用）

example.en: You can tap your phone too.
Can I get a hot chocolate?

sizes:
美国咖啡店尺寸：Small(小) / Medium(中) / Large(大)
星巴克：Tall(中) / Grande(大) / Venti(超大)
例句："A medium latte, please." / "Can I get a grande iced latte?"
coffee_types:
☕ 常见咖啡种类：
Latte 拿铁 · Cappuccino 卡布奇诺 · Americano 美式
Cold Brew 冷萃 · Iced Coffee 冰咖啡 · Mocha 摩卡
Flat White 澳白 · Macchiato 玛奇朵 · Espresso 浓缩
tip:
💡 美国咖啡店实用tips：
1. "What can I get started for you?" 是咖啡店特有的问候，不是 "Can I help you?"
2. 糖浆按"泵(pump)"算：a pump of vanilla = 一泵香草
3. 糕点说 "warmed up" 店员会帮你加热
4. "Can I tap?" = 能用感应卡吗？现在美国大部分咖啡店都支持
5. 小费(tip)：咖啡店结账时刷卡机上会问小费，15%-20%是标准
